findings.content: ⚠️ NEVER: I pai-te hi. — WRONG (uh + i = forbidden)
- Plural: never combine `uh` with `i` (we) — `I pai hi` ✅, `I pai-te hi` ❌
Note: “i” zatna ah, “uh” cih tawh zatkhop kullo hi. “ihi hi”, “i kizasak hi” hil
